THERESA-SILK_THREAD_ENCHANTMENT.title: Cocoon
THERESA-SILK_THREAD_ENCHANTMENT.descript: At the end of your turn, if the card is an Attack, deal 3 damage to a random enemy. Otherwise, gain 3 Block.
THERESA-WISH_SILK_ENCHANTMENT.title: Dream
THERESA-WISH_SILK_ENCHANTMENT.descriptio: Can spread only when you have less than 3 Dream. NL Draw: If Dust has no Dream, transform into [orange]Inherent Dust[/orange] over limit. NL [orange]Inherent Dust[/orange]: At the end of your turn, Linger 1 time and discard this card.
THERESA-MIND_SILK_ENCHANTMENT.title: Mind
THERESA-MIND_SILK_ENCHANTMENT.descriptio: Can replace Cocoon/Tears or be replaced by them. NL [orange]Hand/Dust[/orange]: At the end of your turn, gain {Amount} of the lesser of Hope or Hate.
THERESA-COCOON_SILK_ENCHANTMENT.title: Cocoon
THERESA-COCOON_SILK_ENCHANTMENT.descript: At the end of your turn: If this card is an Attack, deal 3 damage to a random enemy. Otherwise, gain 3 Block.
THERESA-TEAR_SILK_ENCHANTMENT.title: Tears
THERESA-TEAR_SILK_ENCHANTMENT.descriptio: At the end of your turn: Deal 3 damage to a random enemy and gain 3 Block.
THERESA-MEMORY_SILK_ENCHANTMENT.title: Memories
THERESA-MEMORY_SILK_ENCHANTMENT.descript: When played: Remove up to 3 Hate. Gain 1/3/6 Hope based on the amount removed.
